title: Irish Kale Chowder
description: A hearty and comforting Irish-inspired kale chowder, filled with tender kale and silky potatoes.
instructions: 1. In a large pot or Dutch oven, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
4. Add the diced potatoes, chopped kale, and salt. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Sprinkle the flour over the potatoes and kale, and cook for 1 minute.
6. Gradually add the silky milk, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
7. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
8. Use an immersion blender to puree the chowder until smooth.
9. Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
10. Serve hot, garnished with chopped kale or chives if desired.
